mapper.select: SELECT im.* , t.NODE_NM , p.NODE_NM AS PARENT_NM FROM TW_IMPROVE im LEFT JOIN TW_EVAL_DTL ed ON im.DTL_ID = ed.DTL_ID LEFT JOIN TW_TREE t ON ed.NODE_ID = t.NODE_ID LEFT JOIN TW_TREE p ON t.PARENT_ID = p.NODE_ID WHERE im.IMPROVE_ID = #{improveId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TW_IMPROVE (DTL_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, IMP_STATUS, DUE_DT, MANAGER, REG_USER) VALUES (#{dtlId}, #{title}, #{content}, '계획', #{dueDt}, #{manager}, #{regUser})
